response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering practices and distributed systems experience, there is a critical mismatch on core technical requirements. The role requires 8 years of C++ experience; the resume shows only ~6 months of explicit C++ work at National Instruments. Additionally, the candidate's expertise is primarily in web and backend services (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, D), not cloud infrastructure or compute platforms. The leadership experience, while present in staff roles, lacks the cloud or DevOps specialization the role seeks.
strengths: Proven distributed systems experience (Dunnhumby: handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency infrastructure)
Established technical leadership through staff roles and community mentoring (Code Katas, workshops, courses)
Strong software engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and architectural design
concerns: Critical gap: only ~6 months of explicit C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated cloud infrastructure or compute platform specialization—expertise is web and backend services focused
Leadership experience in staff roles lacks cloud or DevOps engineering specialization required for the role
